---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.
Ex. I wish AgentGuard could detect [...] when [...]

**Which component(s) would this affect?**
- [ ] agentguard-sensor (endpoint data collection)
- [ ] integrations/elastic-agentguard (Elasticsearch / Kibana integration)
- [ ] contracts / schema definitions
- [ ] API / gRPC interface
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of the new capability or change you'd like to see.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

**Use case / motivation**
Who benefits from this feature and how? (e.g. security teams, SRE, AI/ML engineers)

**Additional context**
Add any mockups, examples, or references that help illustrate the idea.
